title: T-059 — Pin the downtime.created event contract (08-production → 13-maintenance)
prompt:
# T-059 — Pin the downtime.created event Zod contract

## Goal
13-maintenance T-017 (auto-MWO from downtime) consumes outbox downtime.created but there is NO task that pins the canonical Zod payload. Its red-lines say 'do not invent a downtime schema if 08 has not published one — use a STUB and escalate'. Owning module = 08-production (producer). Mirror the 09-quality T-064 contract-pin pattern. Closes the m13-downtime-event-contract gap.

## Scope
- Define `packages/events/src/downtime.ts` Zod contract with fields: id, equipment_id, severity, reporter_user_id, reason, create_maintenance_task.
- Register downtime.created in the event catalog (00-foundation T-111 enum).
- 13-maintenance T-017 imports the canonical contract instead of a local stub.

## Acceptance criteria
- AC1 — One canonical downtime.created Zod schema in packages/events.
- AC2 — T-017 imports it; event registered in catalog enum.
- AC3 — Producer emits a payload validated by the schema (unit test).

Owner = 08-production (producer). Source: sidecar m13-downtime-event-contract stub (finding F-4 class).
